lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jan raataa har naam kee sevaa |
lines.english: His servants are imbued with the service of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਕਛੁ ਨਾਹਿ ਬਿਓਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har naam japat kachh naeh biog |
lines.english: Chanting the Lord's Name, there is no separation from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਭੋਗ ਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam jan kau bhog jog |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the enjoyment and Yoga of His servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਮਾਲੁ ਖਜੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har jan kai maal khajeenaa |
lines.english: The Lord's Name, Har, Har, is the treasure of wealth of His servants.
O Nanak, worship the Lord, the Lord Divine, Har, Har. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਦੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan jan kau aap prabh deenaa |
lines.english: The treasure of the Lord has been bestowed on His servants by God Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਤਾਪਿ ਜਨ ਅਵਰ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: har prataap jan avar na jaanee |
lines.english: His servants know no other than the Lord's Magnificence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਤਿ ਪੋਤਿ ਜਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: ot pot jan har ras raate |
lines.english: Through and through, His servants are imbued with the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਓਟ ਸਤਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har jan kai ott sataanee |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har is the All-powerful Protection of His servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat mukat bahu kare |
lines.english: Through devotion to the Lord, many have been liberated.
In deepest Samaadhi, they are intoxicated with the essence of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar jan har har japai |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, His servants chant Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਭਗਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਨਹੀ ਛਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa bhagat pragatt nahee chhapai |
lines.english: The devotees of the Lord are known and respected; they do not hide in secrecy.
The Khaamadhayn, the cow of miraculous powers, is the singing of the Glory of the Lord's Name, Har, Har.
This Elysian Tree of miraculous powers is the Name of the Lord.
O Nanak, along with His servants, many others are saved. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਸੰਤ ਰਿਦ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam kee mahimaa sant rid vasai |
lines.english: The Glory of the Naam abides in the hearts of His Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਤਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਕਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te aootam har kee kathaa |
lines.english: Highest of all is the Lord's Speech.
Hearing the Naam, pain and sorrow are removed.
The Society of the Saints is obtained by great good fortune.
By the Saint's kind intervention, all guilt is dispelled.
Serving the Saint, one meditates on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਤੁਲਿ ਕਛੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam tul kachh avar na hoe |
lines.english: There is nothing equal to the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh naam paavai jan koe |8|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, rare are those, who, as Gurmukh, obtain the Naam. ||8||2||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬਹੁ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤੀ ਪੇਖੇ ਸਰਬ ਢਢੋਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: bahu saasatr bahu simritee pekhe sarab dtadtol |
lines.english: The many Shaastras and the many Simritees - I have seen and searched through them all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਸਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਅਮੋਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: poojas naahee har hare naanak naam amol |1|
lines.english: They are not equal to Har, Haray - O Nanak, the Lord's Invaluable Name. ||1||
Chanting, intense meditation, spiritual wisdom and all meditations;
Ashtapadee:
the practice of Yoga and righteous conduct;
the six schools of philosophy and sermons on the scriptures;
the renunciation of everything and wandering around in the wilderness;
the performance of all sorts of works;
cutting the body apart and making the pieces into ceremonial fire offerings;
donations to charities and offerings of jewels to fire;
- none of these are equal to the contemplation of the Name of the Lord,
keeping fasts and making vows of all sorts

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੀਐ ਇਕ ਬਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh naam japeeai ik baar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, if, as Gurmukh, one chants the Naam, even once. ||1||
and burn yourself in fire;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਖੰਡ ਪ੍ਰਿਥਮੀ ਫਿਰੈ ਚਿਰੁ ਜੀਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: nau khandd prithamee firai chir jeevai |
lines.english: You may roam over the nine continents of the world and live a very long life;
you may become a great ascetic and a master of disciplined meditation
you may practice techniques of inner cleansing and all sorts of Yogic postures;
you may give away gold, horses, elephants and land;
you may adopt the self-mortifying ways of the Jains and great spiritual disciplines;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਕਛੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam samasar kachh naeh |
lines.english: There is nothing equal to the Name of the Lord.
piece by piece, you may cut your body apart;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਭੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: tau bhee haumai mail na jaavai |
lines.english: but even so, the filth of your ego shall not depart.
With your mind filled with desire, you may give up your body at a sacred shrine of pilgrimage;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਬੁ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ਨ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਹੁਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: garab gumaan na man te huttai |
lines.english: but even so, egotistical pride shall not be removed from your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh naam japat gat paeh |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, as Gurmukh, chant the Naam, and obtain salvation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਕਉ ਬਹੁ ਸਾਧਨਾ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: eis dehee kau bahu saadhanaa karai |
lines.english: You may subject your body to all sorts of disciplines,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਜਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: man kee mail na tan te jaat |
lines.english: but the filth of your mind shall not leave your body.
You may practice cleansing day and night,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਊਚ ॥
lines.translit: man har ke naam kee mahimaa aooch |
lines.english: O my mind, the Glorious Praise of the Name of the Lord is the highest;
but how can a wall of mud be washed clean?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤੇ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਟਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: man te kabahoo na bikhiaa ttarai |
lines.english: but your mind will never be rid of its corruption.
You may wash this transitory body with loads of water,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਉਧਰੇ ਪਤਿਤ ਬਹੁ ਮੂਚ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam udhare patit bahu mooch |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam has saved so many of the worst sinners. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: bahut siaanap jam kaa bhau biaapai |
lines.english: Even with great cleverness, the fear of death clings to you.
